articles.title: Winthrop man charged with Social Security fraud, concealment
articles.description:
The man allegedly concealed a person’s death from the government so he could fraudulently receive their retirement benefits.

The post Winthrop man charged with Social Security fraud, concealment appeared first on Boston.com.
